cases.contract: An empty root list normalizes to an empty array
Trailing slashes and whitespace collapse to one absolute root
Multiple nested roots sort longest-first so the longest prefix wins
Relative and empty roots are dropped; bare filesystem root is dropped
Only absolute paths with length greater than one survive normalization
Sibling absolute roots keep both entries sorted by length then insertion-stable length ties
A single escaping target is named in the cwd-boundary approval reason

expect.text: Path is outside the session working directory (/home/u/p): /etc/passwd. Approve to allow filesystem access outside the working directory, or set tools.approvalMode: yolo to allow it without prompting.

cases.contract: Multiple escaping targets are comma-joined in the cwd-boundary reason

expect.text: Path is outside the session working directory (/cwd): /a, /b. Approve to allow filesystem access outside the working directory, or set tools.approvalMode: yolo to allow it without prompting.

cases.contract: An empty escaping list still emits the reason shell with an empty target list

expect.text: Path is outside the session working directory (/cwd): . Approve to allow filesystem access outside the working directory, or set tools.approvalMode: yolo to allow it without prompting.
